description_long: This is a black cup with a matte finish and a white interior, featuring three large, angular handles symmetrically spaced around its body. The front of the cup displays handwritten white text, including the letters 'KSP' and the phrase 'LOGO HERE,' suggesting a placeholder for branding. The cup's handles are robust and ergonomically designed, providing multiple gripping options. The overall shape is cylindrical with a slightly flared rim, and the base is flat for stable placement on surfaces. The cup appears to be made primarily of ceramic or plastic, with a smooth, hard exterior. Its design is modern and utilitarian, making it suitable for both domestic and public urban environments.
description: A black cup with a white interior, three large handles, and handwritten white text on the front. The design is modern, with a matte finish and robust handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white 'KSP' text and 'LOGO HERE' inscription, with all three handles visible.
description_view_1: Rear view with no visible text or markings, showing the smooth black surface and three handles.
description_view_2: Side-rear view, similar to view 1, with no visible text and all three handles partially visible.
description_view_3: Side view with no visible text, focusing on the curvature and attachment of the handles.
